Title: DotVVM: Unrestricted file upload
Description:
All users of DotVVM with configured file upload storage are affected.

DotVVM allows anyone to upload files to the application, potentially causing denial of service by filling the disk.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 4.2.11, all versions starting from 4.3.0-preview01-final before 4.3.15, all versions starting from 5.0.0-preview01-final before 5.0.0-preview09-final
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 4.2.11 before 4.3.0-preview01-final, all versions starting from 4.3.15 before 5.0.0-preview01-final, all versions starting from 5.0.0-preview09-final
